notes: P59 defines query observation records only. It does not implement runtime persistence, telemetry, public query logging, shared cache writes, miss ledger writes, probe enqueueing, candidate index mutation, local index mutation, or master-index mutation.
P60 defines the shared query/result cache contract as contract-only and still does not add runtime cache writes or persistent cache storage.
P61 defines the search miss ledger contract as contract-only and still does not add runtime ledger writes, search need creation, probe enqueueing, result cache mutation, or persistent ledger storage.

P62 defines search need records as contract-only future consumers of privacy-filtered observations and still does not add runtime need storage, telemetry, demand counts, probes, or candidate mutation.

P63 defines probe queue items as contract-only future work requests and still does not add probe execution, queue persistence, source cache mutation, evidence ledger mutation, candidate mutation, external calls, or live probes.

P64 defines candidate index records as contract-only provisional review items and still does not add candidate persistence, promotion runtime, public search injection, source cache mutation, evidence ledger mutation, local-index mutation, or master-index mutation.
Raw query retention defaults to none. Future aggregate learning must pass privacy filtering before public reporting.
P66 Known Absence Page v0 is future/contract-only and does not add runtime pages, telemetry, probes, or mutation.

P67 Query Privacy and Poisoning Guard v0 is future/contract-only and adds no runtime guard, telemetry, account/IP tracking, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes.
